data.content:
### Retrieve Google Uptime Metrics via API

Source: https://github.com/upptime/upptime/blob/master/README.md

API endpoints for fetching historical uptime percentage data for Google. These endpoints provide JSON objects containing the uptime percentage for various timeframes, enabling detailed monitoring and reporting.

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/uptime.json
Description: Retrieves the all-time uptime percentage for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., '%').
Example: {"value": 99.99, "unit": "%"}
```

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/uptime-day.json
Description: Retrieves the 24-hour uptime percentage for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., '%').
Example: {"value": 100.00, "unit": "%"}
```

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/uptime-week.json
Description: Retrieves the 7-day uptime percentage for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., '%').
Example: {"value": 100.00, "unit": "%"}
```

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/uptime-month.json
Description: Retrieves the 30-day uptime percentage for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., '%').
Example: {"value": 100.00, "unit": "%"}
```

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/uptime-year.json
Description: Retrieves the 1-year uptime percentage for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., '%').
Example: {"value": 99.99, "unit": "%"}
```

--------------------------------

### Hacker News Uptime API Endpoints

Source: https://github.com/upptime/upptime/blob/master/README.md

These API endpoints provide historical uptime percentages for Hacker News, aggregated over various periods such as 24 hours, 7 days, 30 days, 1 year, and all-time. The data is returned in JSON format.

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/uptime.json
Description: Retrieves the all-time uptime percentage for Hacker News.
```

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/uptime-day.json
Description: Retrieves the 24-hour uptime percentage for Hacker News.
```

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/uptime-week.json
Description: Retrieves the 7-day uptime percentage for Hacker News.
```

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/uptime-month.json
Description: Retrieves the 30-day uptime percentage for Hacker News.
```

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/uptime-year.json
Description: Retrieves the 1-year uptime percentage for Hacker News.
```

--------------------------------

### Hacker News Response Time API Endpoints

Source: https://github.com/upptime/upptime/blob/master/README.md

These API endpoints provide historical response time data for Hacker News, aggregated over various periods such as 24 hours, 7 days, 30 days, 1 year, and all-time. The data is returned in JSON format.

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/response-time.json
Description: Retrieves the all-time average response time for Hacker News.
```

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/response-time-day.json
Description: Retrieves the 24-hour average response time for Hacker News.
```

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/response-time-week.json
Description: Retrieves the 7-day average response time for Hacker News.
```

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/response-time-month.json
Description: Retrieves the 30-day average response time for Hacker News.
```

```APIDOC
GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/upptime/upptime/HEAD/api/hacker-news/response-time-year.json
Description: Retrieves the 1-year average response time for Hacker News.
```

--------------------------------

### Retrieve Google Response Time Metrics via API

Source: https://github.com/upptime/upptime/blob/master/README.md

API endpoints for fetching historical response time data for Google. These endpoints provide JSON objects containing the average response time for various timeframes, useful for programmatic monitoring and analysis.

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/response-time.json
Description: Retrieves the all-time average response time for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., 'ms').
Example: {"value": 94, "unit": "ms"}
```

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/response-time-day.json
Description: Retrieves the 24-hour average response time for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., 'ms').
Example: {"value": 90, "unit": "ms"}
```

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/response-time-week.json
Description: Retrieves the 7-day average response time for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., 'ms').
Example: {"value": 94, "unit": "ms"}
```

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/response-time-month.json
Description: Retrieves the 30-day average response time for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., 'ms').
Example: {"value": 114, "unit": "ms"}
```

```APIDOC
Endpoint: GET /api/google/response-time-year.json
Description: Retrieves the 1-year average response time for Google.
Response: JSON object with 'value' (number) and 'unit' (string, e.g., 'ms').
Example: {"value": 110, "unit": "ms"}
```
